donation_funds.name: Artwork Conservation Fund
donation_funds.description: Supports restoration, preservation, and preventive care for paintings, sculptures, and works on paper in the gallery’s permanent collection.

donation_funds.name: Education & Outreach Programs
donation_funds.description: Funds school tours, educator resources, and community workshops that make art accessible to learners of all ages.

donation_funds.name: Community Access Fund
donation_funds.description: Provides free and reduced-price admission for low-income visitors, seniors, and community partner organizations.

donation_funds.name: Emerging Artists Residency Fund
donation_funds.description: Supports residency stipends, studio space, and exhibition opportunities for local emerging artists.

guided_tours.title: Modern Collection Highlights Tour
guided_tours.description: A docent-led overview of key modern works in the collection, ideal for first-time visitors.

guided_tours.title: Accessible Morning Highlights Tour
guided_tours.description: A slower-paced highlights tour scheduled for weekday mornings, following a wheelchair-accessible route and including frequent seating breaks.

guided_tours.title: Family Discovery Tour
guided_tours.description: Interactive, family-friendly tour with hands-on prompts tailored for children ages 6–12 and their caregivers.

guided_tours.title: Architecture & Public Art Walk
guided_tours.description: Outdoor walking tour exploring the gallery’s architecture and nearby public art installations.

guided_tours.title: Evening Contemporary Art Focus
guided_tours.description: An in-depth look at current contemporary exhibitions, offered on select weekday evenings.

guided_tours.title: Weekend Brunch Tour
guided_tours.description: A relaxed weekend tour paired with a light brunch in the gallery café.

guided_tours.title: Curator’s Choice In-Depth Tour
guided_tours.description: Led by a curator, this tour dives deeply into selected works, focusing on curatorial research and behind-the-scenes stories.

guided_tours.title: Lunchtime Express Tour
guided_tours.description: A 30-minute snapshot of one featured exhibition, perfect for a lunch break visit.

guided_tours.title: Kids’ Storytime Gallery Walk
guided_tours.description: A short tour combining picture-book readings with related artworks in the galleries.

guided_tours.title: Sensory-Friendly Quiet Hours Tour
guided_tours.description: A low-sensory, small-group tour during quiet hours featuring dimmed lights and reduced ambient noise, suitable for visitors with sensory sensitivities.

membership_plans.name: Student Annual Pass
membership_plans.description: Discounted membership for currently enrolled students with valid ID, including free general admission and member pricing on tickets.
membership_plans.benefitsSummary: Free general admission, discounted special exhibition tickets, 10% shop discount, and members-only previews.

membership_plans.name: Student Plus Annual Membership
membership_plans.description: Enhanced student membership with guest passes and access to select member events.
membership_plans.benefitsSummary: All Student Annual benefits plus 2 single-use guest passes and invitations to select member programs.

membership_plans.name: Youth Monthly Pass
membership_plans.description: Flexible month-to-month membership for visitors ages 13–18.
membership_plans.benefitsSummary: Unlimited general admission and discounts on teen workshops and programs.

membership_plans.name: Individual Annual Membership
membership_plans.description: Core membership for one adult with full access to exhibitions and member benefits.
membership_plans.benefitsSummary: Free general admission, discounted tickets, 10% shop discount, and exclusive member events for one adult.

membership_plans.name: Family Membership
membership_plans.description: Membership for up to 2 adults and 4 children in the same household.
membership_plans.benefitsSummary: Free admission for household, 10% shop discount, and free family days and kids’ programs.

membership_plans.name: Dual Senior Membership
membership_plans.description: Discounted membership for two seniors living at the same address.
membership_plans.benefitsSummary: All individual benefits for two named senior members, plus invitations to daytime programs.

products.name: Modern Blue Abstract Postcard
products.description: A matte-finish postcard featuring a vivid blue abstract painting from the gallery’s modern collection.

products.name: Abstract Sunrise Postcard
products.description: A bright, warm-toned postcard inspired by the colors of sunrise over the city skyline.

products.name: Gallery Exterior at Night Postcard
products.description: Glossy postcard showing the gallery’s illuminated facade at dusk.

products.name: Kids’ Animal Art Postcard
products.description: A playful postcard featuring animal illustrations created in the children’s studio program.

products.name: Gallery Architecture Linework Postcard
products.description: Detailed line drawing of the gallery’s main staircase, printed on heavyweight cardstock.

products.name: Colorfield Wall Print (18"×24")
products.description: High-quality giclée print of a popular colorfield painting, ready for framing.

products.name: 2025 Contemporary Exhibition Catalog
products.description: Full-color catalog featuring essays, interviews, and images from the 2025 contemporary art exhibition.

products.name: Kids’ Art Activity Book
products.description: A spiral-bound activity book with drawing prompts, games, and stickers inspired by the collection.

products.name: Gallery Logo T-Shirt (Black)
products.description: Soft cotton t-shirt featuring the gallery logo in white on black.

products.name: Canvas Gallery Tote Bag
products.description: Sturdy natural canvas tote with long handles and a screen-printed gallery mark.

products.name: Colorblock Ceramic Mug
products.description: Dishwasher-safe ceramic mug with a wraparound colorblock design inspired by a collection favorite.

products.name: Mini Masterpieces Magnet Set
products.description: Set of four fridge magnets featuring miniature reproductions of collection highlights.

events.title: Clay Sculpture Basics Workshop
events.description: Hands-on introductory workshop covering simple clay hand-building techniques. No prior experience required; all materials provided.

events.title: Monotype Printmaking Evening Lab
events.description: Experiment with color, texture, and layering in this guided monotype printmaking session for adults and older teens.

events.title: Family Collage Morning
events.description: Drop-in collage making inspired by works from the current exhibition. All ages welcome with an adult.

events.title: Teens Digital Art Lab
events.description: A guided session for teens exploring drawing tablets and digital painting tools.

events.title: Curator Talk: New Perspectives in Contemporary Art
events.description: A gallery curator discusses themes, artists, and curatorial decisions behind the current contemporary exhibition.

events.title: Sketching in the Galleries
events.description: Guided sketching session in the galleries with short drawing prompts and live demonstrations.

events.title: Family Storytime in the Galleries
events.description: Storytelling session for young children with picture books and matching artworks, followed by a simple craft.

events.title: Intro to Relief Printmaking
events.description: Carve and print your own small relief block in this beginner-friendly workshop.

events.title: Evening Watercolor Landscapes
events.description: Relaxed watercolor painting session focused on simple landscape techniques.

events.title: Open Life Drawing Session
events.description: Uninstructional life drawing session with a live model. Easels provided; bring your own drawing materials.

events.title: Spring Exhibition Opening Reception
events.description: Celebrate the opening of the spring exhibition with music, refreshments, and brief curator remarks.

events.title: Special Highlights Guided Tour
events.description: A docent-led highlights tour of the current exhibitions with time for questions at the end.

events.title: Summer Art Camp Information Session
events.description: Overview of the upcoming summer art camp sessions for kids and teens, with Q&A for families.

exhibitions.title: Tiny Treasures: Art for Young Explorers
exhibitions.subtitle: Playful artworks designed at kid-height
exhibitions.description: An interactive exhibition of small-scale paintings, sculptures, and installations specifically arranged for young visitors to explore at their own level, with simple labels and activity prompts.

exhibitions.title: Hands-On Color: Family Studio Showcase
exhibitions.subtitle: Collaborative works by kids and caregivers
exhibitions.description: Featuring vibrant paintings, collages, and textiles created in the gallery’s family studio programs, this exhibition invites visitors to try simple making activities right in the gallery.

exhibitions.title: Stories in Clay: Community Ceramics
exhibitions.subtitle: Neighborhood narratives in fired earth
exhibitions.description: Local artists and community members share personal narratives through hand-built ceramic works, from tiles to vessels and sculptural forms.

exhibitions.title: Pressed & Printed: Nature for Families
exhibitions.subtitle: Botanical prints and family activity stations
exhibitions.description: Explore delicate botanical prints alongside hands-on rubbing and stamping stations designed for children and their caregivers.

exhibitions.title: Light & Shadow: Contemporary Photography
exhibitions.subtitle: Experimenting with exposure and time
exhibitions.description: A special exhibition of contemporary photographers who play with long exposures, projections, and architectural light to create evocative images.

exhibitions.title: City in Motion: Urban Abstractions
exhibitions.subtitle: Painting the energy of the streets
exhibitions.description: Large-scale abstract paintings, projections, and sound works that capture the rhythm, light, and density of contemporary city life.

exhibitions.title: Immersive Color Fields
exhibitions.subtitle: Walk-in paintings of light and sound
exhibitions.description: An immersive special exhibition featuring large projected color fields and ambient soundscapes that visitors can move through and linger in.

exhibitions.title: Modern Masters: Collection Highlights
exhibitions.subtitle: Key works from 1900–1970
exhibitions.description: A rotating selection of iconic modern paintings and sculptures from the gallery’s permanent collection.

exhibitions.title: Patterns of the City
exhibitions.subtitle: Photography, textiles, and maps
exhibitions.description: Artists trace the visual patterns of the city—grids, networks, and flows—using photography, weaving, and data visualization.

exhibitions.title: Material Memory: Contemporary Textiles
exhibitions.subtitle: Weaving personal and collective histories
exhibitions.description: Textile artists use weaving, embroidery, and mixed media to explore themes of memory, migration, and identity.

exhibitions.title: Sound Lines: Interactive Drawing
exhibitions.subtitle: Drawing with sound-responsive light
exhibitions.description: Visitors draw with light pens that leave trails captured and transformed by sound in a responsive installation.

exhibitions.title: Local Voices: Annual Student Exhibition
exhibitions.subtitle: Emerging artists from nearby schools
exhibitions.description: Paintings, prints, sculptures, and digital works by high school and college students from across the region.

exhibitions.title: Winter Landscapes: From the Collection
exhibitions.subtitle: Seasonal selection of works on paper
exhibitions.description: A small-focus exhibition of drawings and prints depicting winter scenes from the permanent collection.

exhibition_ticket_slots.notes: Recommended arrival 15 minutes before start time.
This time slot is fully booked.
Displayed for reference but not bookable.
Includes access to artist video interviews in the screening room.
Not recommended for visitors sensitive to flashing lights.
Family-friendly; children must be accompanied by an adult.
Temporarily unavailable due to gallery programming.
Free timed entry; walk-ins admitted as capacity allows.
